allow: Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-20.04 -- bash -lc 'cd ~/CPDOT2 && source devel/setup.bash && cd build && make help 2>&1 | grep -i "topolog\\|formation" | head -30')

Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-20.04 -- bash -lc 'cd ~/CPDOT2/src/CPDOT2/formation_planner && touch src/formation_planning/formation_planner.cpp src/formation_planning/topologic_pp.cpp include/formation_planner/formation_planner.h && cd ~/CPDOT2/build/formation_planner && make topologic_test -j2 2>&1 | tail -40')

Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-20.04 -- bash -lc 'rm -f ~/CPDOT2/build/formation_planner/CMakeFiles/formation_planner.dir/src/formation_planning/formation_planner.cpp.o ~/CPDOT2/build/formation_planner/CMakeFiles/topologic_pp.dir/src/formation_planning/topologic_pp.cpp.o && cd ~/CPDOT2/build/formation_planner && make topologic_test -j2 2>&1 | tail -100')
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-20.04 -- bash -lc 'cd ~/CPDOT2/build/formation_planner && make formation_planner topologic_pp -B -j2 2>&1 | tail -40')
